result.text:
What's built to show, is built to grow.

It's safe to say that Kaito AI has mastered this marketing principle! 💯

These guys have become experts at curating their platform to be a well-oiled UGC machine built for virality!

Their whole product basically advertises itself now!   

You have:

- Social Card
- Yaps Dashboard
- Yapper Leaderboard
- Mindshare Maps
- Top Gainers List

The list goes on!

Their latest addition is a nice touch too - a Kaito "Wrapped" style infographic! 👏

result.text:
Fully agree! They've been working on this for quite some time so they definitely ensured every aspect of the platform enabled this "show=grow" principle.

TBH, the concept is not new, as we've seen it with many DeFi projects (the profit cards). Kaito have been able to do it just many more times over haha
